issues.description: Effect completely missing the core mechanic: returning DON!! cards from field to DON!! deck and adding a DON!! from deck. Current action only returns to hand (ReturnToHand), which is incorrect. Should include conditional return of DON!! cards and attachment of DON!! from deck.
ReturnToHand is wrong action type. Should be a custom action or sequence: return DON!! to deck (not hand), then AttachDon from deck.
Missing condition that return is optional ('You may') and the exchange mechanic (return N cards, add up to 1 back). DSL does not capture the conditional/optional nature or the deck search component.
